title: Contract Navigator Agent
abstract_summary_cn: 规则摘要：这项研究围绕“Contract Navigator Agent”提出了可进一步验证的技术方向。
abstract_summary_en: An AI agent for legal document workflow automation and clause review.
key_innovation: The paper introduces a product-relevant method, workflow, or evaluation signal.
why_it_matters: It may reduce the cost or complexity of a repeatable user task.
business_insight: 优先把论文能力收窄成一个高频、可衡量的客户任务：面向单一工作流的 AI Agent SaaS。
product_idea: Turn the method into a narrow workflow copilot.
skill_or_agent_idea: Create a reusable skill that applies Contract Navigator Agent to one customer workflow.
why_selected: Selected by deterministic commercial and feasibility signals.
risks: The research result may not transfer to real customer data; validate quality and cost early.
recommended_next_step: Interview five target users and build one measurable demo within seven days.
